actionable_lessons: Use official Polymarket docs as the top external source when reasoning about market structure and API behavior.
Cross-check all builder, CLOB, and market-data assumptions against this source before changing runtime logic.
anti_patterns: This does not prove a trading edge.
Docs describe interfaces and constraints, not profitability.
body:
Actionable lessons:
- Use official Polymarket docs as the top external source when reasoning about market structure and API behavior.
- Cross-check all builder, CLOB, and market-data assumptions against this source before changing runtime logic.

What it does not justify:
- This does not prove a trading edge.
- Docs describe interfaces and constraints, not profitability.
summary: Primary entry point for Polymarket developer documentation, including market data, trading, and developer resources.
title: Polymarket Documentation Overview
